modules.title: Today's Weather
modules.summary: Partly cloudy with patchy morning fog. Light winds and warm daytime conditions expected.
bullet_points: Slight chance of a shower in the southwest, near zero chance elsewhere

modules.title: Fire Danger & Burning Status
modules.summary: Fire danger is MODERATE today. Campfires and solid fuel BBQs are ALLOWED with mandatory safety requirements. Restricted Burning Period (Autumn) ends midnight Sunday 3 May 2026.
bullet_points: 3-meter clearance of all flammable material required
Adult in attendance at all times
Reliable water supply must be on hand
A Permit to Burn is required during Restricted Burning periods
Contact your Fire Control Officer or Shire Rangers before lighting up

modules.title: Waste Collection Schedule
modules.summary: Weekly green waste (FOGO) collection continues. Determine fortnightly bin type using anchor date logic.

metrics.label: Calculation Method
metrics.value: Count weeks from anchor; even = Recyclables (Yellow), odd = Landfill (Red)

bullet_points: FOGO (Green) bin goes out every week
Calculate weeks elapsed since 2025-06-30 to determine current fortnightly bin
If weeks elapsed is even number: put out Recyclables (Yellow)
If weeks elapsed is odd number: put out Landfill (Red)
Contact Shire of Augusta Margaret River for specific week confirmation
